title: gamblea ciliata var. ciliata
intro: Gamblea ciliata var. ciliata, also known as the hairy gamblea or hairy licorice root, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Alismataceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. The health benefits of Gamblea ciliata var. ciliata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve overall digestive health, and provide relief from anxiety and insomnia. Gamblea ciliata var. ciliata is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
